allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe"\); $found = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }; if \($found\) { $found } else { "node not found in common paths"; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source })
